ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type (e.g., multivariate, univariate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., multivariate, univariate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "task_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task type (e.g., classification, regression, clustering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_task_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_type_id") REFERENCES task_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the task type (e.g., classification, regression, clustering) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target variable */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the variable belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the target variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the target variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_variables_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tasks" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset-task relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task performed in the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the algorithm (e.g., supervised, unsupervised) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_algorithms" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the experiment */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Evaluation metric used (e.g., accuracy, f1-score, mean squared error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_users" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_forums" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_forums_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_forums_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "tag")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_comments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
